extracurricular_activity_and_description: Scotch Plains-Fanwood High School – Student Council Representative (Grades 10–12). Attend weekly lunchtime meetings (approx. 1 hour/week) plus additional planning sessions before major events (homecoming, charity drives). During peak times (e.g., fall homecoming, spring fundraiser) commitment increases to 3–4 hours/week including evenings for decorating, setup, and cleanup.

Scotch Plains-Fanwood High School – Varsity Girls Soccer Team (Grades 9–12). In-season commitment is 2-hour practices Monday–Friday plus games 1–2 times per week (total ~10–14 hours/week from late August through early November). Off-season conditioning 2 afternoons per week (~3–4 hours/week) from January through May.

American Red Cross Club – Member (Grades 11–12). Attend biweekly after-school meetings (1 hour every other week) and volunteer at blood drives and community health events approximately one Saturday per month (3–4 hours each event). Average time commitment is 3–5 hours/month during the school year.

St. Bartholomew’s Church Youth Group – Volunteer & Peer Leader. Weekly Sunday evening meetings (1.5 hours/week) plus community service projects such as food pantry sorting and holiday toy drives 1–2 Saturdays per month (2–3 hours each). Average of 6–8 hours/month during the school year, up to 10 hours/month around holidays.

Part-time Crew Member – CVS Pharmacy, Scotch Plains, NJ. Work 2–3 shifts per week during the school year (typically 4–5 hours per shift on weekday evenings and occasional weekends), averaging 8–12 hours/week. During summer and school breaks, increase to 15–20 hours/week, primarily afternoon and early evening shifts.

Peer Tutoring – Math and Biology (School-Based Program). Provide free tutoring to underclassmen through the school’s academic support center. Commit to one scheduled after-school session per week (1 hour) and occasional extra sessions before major exams (1–2 additional hours as needed). Average 4–6 hours/month during the academic year.

Scotch Plains Recreation Department – Summer Camp Counselor-in-Training (Seasonal). Assist senior counselors with activities for elementary school campers. Work 4 mornings per week (8:30 AM–12:30 PM) for six weeks during the summer, averaging 16 hours/week between late June and early August.

Key Club – Community Service Member (Grades 10–12). Attend monthly meetings (1 hour/month) and participate in service projects such as park cleanups, clothing drives, and charity walks 1–2 times per month (2–3 hours each event). Average 4–6 hours/month throughout the school year with occasional larger weekend events requiring 5–6 hours.

Local 5K/Charity Run Volunteer – Scotch Plains & Fanwood Events. Volunteer at 3–4 local races per year doing water station support, registration check-in, and course guidance. Each event requires approximately 4–5 hours on weekend mornings. Average annual commitment of 15–20 hours spread across the year.

Family Care Responsibilities – Younger Sibling Supervision. Provide after-school supervision for younger brother on weekdays when parents work late. Typically 2–3 days per week for about 1.5–2 hours each day (help with homework, prepare snacks, and ensure he gets to sports practice on time), averaging 4–6 hours/week during the school year.
